title: Red's Unbreakable Enchantment
description: An Enchantment that makes anything Unbreakable.
body:
**Red’s Unbreakable Enchantment** is a simple, straightforward mod for Minecraft that adds a brand-new enchantment: **Unbreakable**.

When applied to any item that has durability and can normally receive Unbreaking and Mending, the Unbreakable enchantment does exactly what it says — it makes that item completely unbreakable. No durability loss. No repairs. No maintenance.

Designed as a clean replacement for both Unbreaking and Mending, this single enchantment removes the need for constant repairing while still fitting naturally into the game.

Unbreakable is a **treasure enchantment**, meaning it’s special — but it’s still obtainable through multiple vanilla-friendly ways. You can:

* Trade for it with villagers
* Find it in loot chests
* Obtain it from the enchanting table

Available for **NeoForge, Fabric, and Quilt** on **Minecraft 1.21.11**. Also Available as **DataPack**.
